Row.Text: Competitive multiplayer balance that preserves each identity while reducing runaway snowball numbers.

Replace.Text: [BLIST][LI][B]Equal Footing:[/B] [icon:YIELD_CITIES] [B]Cities [/B]receive [B]+1[icon:YIELD_SCIENCE] Science [/B]per Age when you complete a [icon:RADIAL_CIVICS] [B]Civic Mastery[/B]. This resets at the start of each Age. [LI]Gain [B][icon:YIELD_CULTURE] Culture [/B]equal to 75% of your total [B][icon:YIELD_SCIENCE] Science [/B]per turn when you complete a [icon:RADIAL_TECH] [B]Technology Mastery[/B].[/LIST]
[B]Equal Footing:[/B] City growth bonus reduced; specialist science identity preserved.
